pruning_bias.note: Filter is a SEPARATE A-dependency qualification stage; it did NOT remove families from the stage-2 contamination run (all 112 families present in stage-2 results). So the rescore has no survivorship bias. The exclusion pattern is itself evidence: the same NLI instrument, run on correction-state draws, independently flagged 73% of F2 families (0% F1, 0% F3) as anomalously 'asserted' — a second confirmation that F2's template is where the NLI misbehaves.
